diff: Core GovOps, in consultation with the Core Council Risk Advisor, has the ability to modify any of the Prime Allocator Vault Risk Parameters listed under Prime Allocator Vault Risk Parameters. The modification of said parameters is pursuant to the Operational Weekly Cycle and can be effected directly via an Executive Vote, without requiring a prior Governance Poll.
